item.title: This.is the greatest news article I have ever read
item.description:
https://www.pcgamer.com/gaming-industry/the-brass-balls-on-these-guys-openai-complains-that-deepseek-has-been-using-its-data-you-know-the-copyrighted-data-its-been-scraping-from-everywhere/
Check out my YouTube channel, by the way. I do reviews of video games that are weird and I have a podcast where my co-hosts and I go through fan wikis and try to understand the canon of gigantic franchises without directly consuming them. I also sometimes do videos about hilariously bad movies and awesome video game music. https://youtube.com/@weirdvideogames
item.dc:creator: Heisanevilgenius

item.title: Maui From Moana Works at Costco ...
item.description: "Every time he sees my daughters, he yells out to them with a ‘chee-hoo!’ and they love it." Meanwhile, Va'ana revealed that he hadn't intentionally tried to resemble the character. He told Hawaii News Now, "I've grown out my hair just to try something different and then after the movie, I was like, 'Wow, I kinda look like that guy.'" He had no idea he had gone viral until his coworkers informed him the next day at work. He explained, "I'm not that great on phones honestly. I'm barely on social media. I came to work yesterday and everybody was like, 'Eh, you went viral.' I'm like, 'OK. What does that mean?'" https://www.instagram.com/maui_yourwelcome/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Felt Powerless Before Reading This
item.description:
Been feeling absolutely overwhelmed.
Friend sent me this article, so I gave it a skim.
Turns out I've already been helping fight fascism!
Sauce: https://www.404media.co/declassified-cia-guide-to-sabotaging-fascism-is-suddenly-viral/ In all seriousness, we need to tread on them lots, actually. Hope y'all can get some good rest this week and find a sense of community in the midst of all this chaotic shit. Love you guys.
item.dc:creator: HazelandChaCha

Jackie Daytona
Never get out of the car
Something about leopards and faces, IDK
I do not want it in rap, I don't not want it in country, I do not want it in rock
Wish this video wasn't so many hours long
New name for people I don't like and forgot the name of
Astigmatism has me moving my head back and forth from the monitor like a magic eye painting
My buddy Albert is pushing 14 now and can nap down
Ernie hates sweaters, but know the punishment for yelling at the neighbor girls

item.title: Any advice is appreciated!
item.description: We've reached out to local emergency grants and don't qualify because we are not a 501(c)(3). We're relying on personal donations and aren't getting many bites. Any experts here? Don't know how to face closure. Here is a GoFundMe link that was requested. https://gofund.me/54584104

item.title: USDA inspector general escorted out by security after defying Trump termination
item.description: WASHINGTON, Jan 29 (Reuters) - Security agents escorted the inspector general of the U.S. Department of Agriculture out of her office on Monday after she refused to comply with her firing by the Trump administration, sources familiar with the matter told Reuters. Phyllis Fong, a 22-year veteran of the department, had earlier told colleagues that she intended to stay after the White House terminated her Friday, saying that she didn’t believe the administration had followed proper protocols, the sources said. In an email to colleagues on Saturday, reviewed by Reuters, she said the independent Council of the Inspectors General on Integrity and Efficiency “has taken the position that these termination notices do not comply with the requirements set out in law and therefore are not effective at this time.” The White House defended the firing of Fong and the other inspectors general, saying "these rogue, partisan bureaucrats... have been relieved of their duties in order to make room for qualified individuals who will uphold the rule of law and protect Democracy." https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/01/29/usda-inspector-general-escorted-office-trump-white-house/78024513007/
item.dc:creator: puzzledeagle

item.title: The Dump Has Two Faces
item.dc:creator: derek237

item.title: Dinosaur wedding dress
item.description:
Found a fancy wedding dress while thrift shopping for 29.99
I already have plans after trying it on and finding out it fit
Glitter dinosaurs because who doesn't want dinosaurs in their wedding
Dying the satin layer
Got a super awesome ombre on my first attempt!
After the dye job was dry
Looking good time to work on other wedding things
Wood flowers dyed and touched up
Dinos for the bouquet/boutonniere
The pink had to go... also see first idea of bottom ruffle in lime green
Bouquet progress not the final results but getting there
Final plan of ruffles pinned up
Starting to attach all of the dinos, this took forever
Final bouquet
His butoneere
All of the dinos pinned where I want them still got to attach them at this point
Finished results! Added a detachable cape held on with dinosaur pins! Super happy with how it turned out Front page edit: omg thank you everyone!
item.dc:creator: yagubluck

item.title: The 503rd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
This week, I'm once again asking for your monetary support for a good cause. An online friend of mine has to move in a few weeks and needs help rehoming her cat, because she cannot take her with. She already has a home found for the catto, but needs help with vet and food bills so the nice old lady taking the cat will not have to spend her Social Security check to do it. If you can give any money to help with these costs, please donate! The catto will be very happy if you do! https://gofund.me/35567dd8
I hope this works
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This also the last week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
I would eat tree bark before I'd eat Bopa Shaun's pizza
You are than you seem, Stronger than you Braver believe, and than youthink (there's no space between the u and t) Smarter you are.
Would've been better to cover the P and ION in Passion
Sounds like the perfect amount to solve our billionaire crisis
I'm so sorry
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: It’s getting really bad here
item.description: In the US. We live in a liberal city. But there’s still Trumpers here, and I’m sure they’re emboldened. That is what I feel is the most immediate threat. But things are going to get bad. I’m really scared. I wish we could leave this shithole country.

item.title: Today I had to go to a different barber due to my project out of town. To relax me she massaged my head. (Never had that before.) I really liked it, but all I could think about was this:
item.dc:creator: RidiculouslyIncompetent

item.title: Stop Kidnapping kittens.
item.description: So, I understand if you're rescuing an entire litter +mom, or found an abandoned kitten, but please stop taking kittens without giving it some thought. Look for other kittens, look for mom, call some experts. And sure as hell don't hand a tiny kitten to a toddler.
item.dc:creator: DrYuaTakeda
